name: fifa-world-cup
title: FIFA World Cup
description: Comprehensive data on all men's FIFA World Cup tournaments (1930–2022) and women's FIFA World Cup tournaments (1991–2019), including matches, goals, squads, bookings, penalty kicks, substitutions, referees, managers, stadiums, group standings, awards, and more. Sourced from the Fjelstul World Cup Database.

resources.name: tournaments
resources.description: One row per tournament. Covers all 22 men's (1930–2022) and 8 women's (1991–2019) editions.

resources.name: matches
resources.description: One row per match. Includes stage, group, date, teams, full-time and half-time scores, extra time, penalty shootout scores, and result.

resources.name: goals
resources.description: One row per goal. Includes scorer, team, minute, match period, own goal flag, and penalty flag.

resources.name: bookings
resources.description: One row per booking (yellow or red card). Includes player, team, minute, and card type.

resources.name: penalty_kicks
resources.description: One row per penalty kick in a shootout. Includes player, team, kick order, and outcome.

resources.name: substitutions
resources.description: One row per substitution. Includes player on, player off, team, and minute.

resources.name: squads
resources.description: One row per player per tournament squad. Includes position, shirt number, and club.

resources.name: players
resources.description: One row per player. Master list of all players who have appeared in a World Cup squad.

resources.name: teams
resources.description: One row per national team. Includes team name, code, and confederation.

resources.name: group_standings
resources.description: One row per team per group. Includes played, won, drawn, lost, goals for, goals against, and points.

resources.name: tournament_standings
resources.description: Final standings per tournament (winner, runner-up, third place, etc.).

resources.name: award_winners
resources.description: One row per award per tournament. Covers Golden Boot, Golden Ball, Golden Glove, Best Young Player, and Fair Play Award.

resources.name: awards
resources.description: Reference table of award types.

resources.name: stadiums
resources.description: One row per stadium. Includes name, city, country, and capacity.

resources.name: referees
resources.description: Master list of referees who have officiated at a World Cup.

resources.name: managers
resources.description: Master list of managers who have managed a team at a World Cup.

resources.name: confederations
resources.description: Reference table of FIFA confederations.

resources.name: host_countries
resources.description: One row per host country per tournament (tournaments with multiple hosts have multiple rows).

resources.name: qualified_teams
resources.description: One row per team per tournament they qualified for.

resources.name: groups
resources.description: One row per group per tournament.

resources.name: tournament_stages
resources.description: One row per stage per tournament (group stage, round of 16, quarter-finals, etc.).

resources.name: team_appearances
resources.description: One row per team per match. Includes side (home/away), score, and result.

resources.name: player_appearances
resources.description: One row per player per match. Includes position played, minutes on pitch, and starter flag.

resources.name: manager_appearances
resources.description: One row per manager per match.

resources.name: manager_appointments
resources.description: One row per manager per tournament they managed at.

resources.name: referee_appearances
resources.description: One row per referee per match.

resources.name: referee_appointments
resources.description: One row per referee per tournament they officiated at.

resources.name: tournament-goals-summary
resources.title: Average Goals Per Game by Tournament (Summary)
resources.description: Pre-aggregated average goals per game for each men's World Cup tournament (1930–2022).

resources.name: goals-by-minute-summary
resources.title: Goals by Match Minute (Summary)
resources.description: Total goals scored at each match minute (1–90) across all men's World Cup tournaments, excluding own goals.

resources.name: top-scorers-summary
resources.title: Top 15 All-Time World Cup Scorers (Summary)
resources.description: Players with the most goals across all men's World Cup tournaments (1930–2022), excluding own goals.

resources.name: tournament-appearances
resources.title: World Cup Appearances by Nation (Summary)
resources.description: Top 20 nations by number of men's World Cup tournaments appeared in (1930–2022).

resources.name: goal-timing-by-tournament-summary
resources.title: Goal Timing by Tournament (Summary)
resources.description: Per-tournament goal timing for each men's World Cup (1930–2022): total goals, goals scored in stoppage time, the share of goals arriving in stoppage time, and the average goal minute. Stoppage-time goals were rarely logged before 1998 and now account for more than one in ten. Includes own goals.

fields.name: regulation_goals
fields.description: Goals scored with no stoppage time added (minute_stoppage = 0)

fields.name: pct_goals_in_stoppage
fields.description: Percentage of goals scored in stoppage time

fields.name: avg_goal_minute
fields.description: Average goal minute (regulation minute + stoppage minute; extra-time goals included)

resources.name: discipline-by-tournament-summary
resources.title: Discipline by Tournament (Summary)
resources.description: Cards shown at each men's World Cup since cards were introduced at Mexico 1970 (1970–2022): yellow cards, second yellows, straight reds, total dismissals, and cards per match. Germany 2006 is the most-carded tournament on record at 5.23 cards per match.

fields.name: yellow_cards
fields.description: Total yellow cards shown (every caution, including both yellows of a two-yellow dismissal)

fields.name: second_yellow_cards
fields.description: Cautions that were a player's second yellow (resulting in dismissal)

fields.name: total_cards
fields.description: Total cards shown (yellow cards + straight red cards)

resources.name: dirtiest-matches-summary
resources.title: Most-Carded Matches (Summary)
resources.description: The 15 most-carded matches in men's World Cup history, ranked by total cards. Netherlands vs Argentina (2022 quarter-final) tops the list — the most-carded match the database records.

fields.name: yellow_cards
fields.description: Yellow cards shown in the match

fields.name: red_cards
fields.description: Players sent off in the match

fields.name: total_cards
fields.description: Total cards shown (yellow cards + straight red cards)

resources.name: attendance
resources.description: Per-match attendance for all 964 men's World Cup matches (1930–2022) — the figure the Fjelstul match tables do not include. Compiled from Kaggle/FIFA records (1930–2010, cross-checked to the exact person against an independent reference) and Wikipedia match reports (2014/2018/2022, totals matching FIFA). Joins to matches on (year, teams, date).

fields.name: stage
fields.description: Detailed stage label as recorded by the source (e.g. 'Group A', 'Round of 16', 'Final')

fields.name: phase
fields.description: Coarse phase derived from stage: 'Group' or 'Knockout'

fields.name: team1
fields.description: First team (home/listed-first); historical names preserved (e.g. West Germany, Yugoslavia)

fields.name: score
fields.description: Full-time/AET score as 'team1-team2' (penalty shootouts not encoded here)

fields.name: source
fields.description: Provenance of the attendance figure for this row

resources.name: attendance-by-edition
resources.title: Average Attendance per Edition (Summary)
resources.description: Pre-aggregated attendance for each men's World Cup (1930–2022): matches played, total spectators, and average attendance per match. Aggregated from the attendance resource.

fields.name: total_attendance
fields.description: Total spectators across all matches in the tournament

views.name: goals-per-game
views.title: Average Goals Per Game by Tournament
views.description: Average number of goals per match at each men's World Cup (1930–2022). The 1954 Switzerland tournament peaks at 5.38 goals per game — the highest ever. The modern game has settled around 2.5–2.7.

views.name: goals-by-minute
views.title: When Are World Cup Goals Scored?
views.description: Distribution of goals by match minute across all men's World Cup tournaments (1930–2022), excluding own goals. Spikes at minutes 45 and 90 reflect stoppage-time goals logged at the regulation minute.

views.name: top-scorers
views.title: Top 15 All-Time World Cup Scorers
views.description: Players with the most goals across all men's World Cup tournaments (1930–2022), excluding own goals. Miroslav Klose's record of 16 goals across four tournaments remains unmatched.

views.name: tournament-appearances
views.title: World Cup Appearances by Nation (Top 20)
views.description: Top 20 nations by number of men's World Cup tournaments participated in (1930–2022). Brazil is the only country to have appeared in all 22 tournaments.

views.name: stoppage-time-goals
views.title: The Rise of the Stoppage-Time Goal
views.description: Share of men's World Cup goals scored in stoppage time, by tournament (1930–2022). Almost no stoppage-time goals were logged before 1998; at Russia 2018 they reached 13% of all goals.

views.name: cards-per-match
views.title: The Dirtiest World Cups
views.description: Cards per match at each men's World Cup since cards were introduced in 1970. Discipline peaked at Germany 2006 (5.23 cards per match) and has eased since.

views.name: dirtiest-matches
views.title: The Most-Carded Matches in World Cup History
views.description: The 15 men's World Cup matches with the most cards. Netherlands vs Argentina (2022) leads — the most-carded match in the database.

views.name: attendance-by-edition
views.title: Average Attendance per Edition (1930–2022)
views.description: Average attendance per match at each men's World Cup. United States 1994 is still the record at 68,991 per match; the per-edition average has settled between ~42,000 and ~53,000 in the 64-match era.
